name: Peppy Pizza Pies
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb ground beef, browned and drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Lightly grease a cookie sheet.
3. Separate dough into 10 biscuits. Press or roll each to form a 5-inch circle with a 1/4 inch rim around the outside edge.
4. Spread 2 tablespoons of sauce just along the edges of the pizza; sprinkle each with a small amount of oregano.
5. Top each pizza with pepperoni, ground beef, and cheeses.
6. Bake at 400°F for 12-15 minutes until crust is golden brown and cheese is melted.
7. Remove from cookie sheet. Refrigerate leftovers. Makes 10 pizzas.
